_comment: Single source of truth for the IJT Browser CI image consumed by integration.yml live-webclient-browser. IJT_BROWSER_CI_IMAGE is constructed at runtime as image@digest. Refresh procedure: the build-browser-ci-image workflow publishes a verified image, and a maintainer opens a normal reviewed PR updating this file when main should consume that digest. The workflow MUST fail fast if digest does not match ^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$.
